name: Metro de Los Teques

agency.name: C.A. Metro de Los Teques (operada por C.A. Metro de Caracas)

notes: Operated by Metro de Caracas. Line 1 runs from Las Adjuntas (interchange with Caracas Metro L2) to Ayacucho (3 operational stations). A Line 2 extension toward San Antonio de los Altos has been under construction for years and is excluded per the operational-only policy.
